rationale: The citing paper’s core contribution is a new boundary condition for the endowment effect (WTA–WTP gap), and the cited paper is explicitly about the “boundaries of loss aversion” using the same endowment-effect constructs (WTA/WTP/CE). This strong construct and theory overlap suggests the cited work is likely a substantive conceptual foundation rather than an incidental mention. The match is DOI-verified (10.1509/jmkr.42.2.119.62292).
